song.title: You are Fresh as the Dew
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) You are fresh as The dew of the morning, Lord; Like a stream flowing free, You supply my need.|| Lord, I open my heart to You, My beloved One; Whisp’ring all of my thoughts, Bathing in Your love.
[V2] 2) How can I fully say What is in my heart, When You pour out Your love fully unto me?|| Like a fountain of water, Your love my spirit fills; Like a bright flame of fire, In my bosom burns.
[V3] 3) Come and burn all away That is not of You, Burn away all the dross Of the earthly loves.|| Let me be whiter than the snow In Your love, dear Lord; Let me live in Yourself, Your unblemished love.
[V4] 4) I’m in You; I am filled With Your life of love; Of our union in love, I will testify.|| All my strength, all my weakness Is swallowed in Your love; My dear Lord, Now I live by Your love divine.
song.author: Titus Chu
